name: Everything Openclaw (EO)
description: Multi-expert collaboration plugin for OpenClaw - 141 experts, 9 standardized commands, skill compatibility layer

extensions.name: eo_collab
extensions.description: Main multi-expert collaboration tool - coordinates team of experts for complex tasks

extensions.name: eo_list_experts
extensions.description: List available experts in the EO expert library

extensions.name: eo_plan
extensions.description: Create project plan with Planner expert - generates WBS, milestones, team composition

extensions.name: eo_architect
extensions.description: Design system architecture with Architect expert - tech stack, modules, risks

extensions.name: eo_verify
extensions.description: Verify checkpoint with QA expert - validate stage deliverables

extensions.name: eo_code_review
extensions.description: Code review with CodeReviewer expert - security, performance, style analysis

hooks.name: eo-expert
hooks.description: EO Expert coordination hook - triggers multi-expert workflow when needed
